description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a combination of glass, concrete, and wood exterior finishes. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows, multiple balconies with glass railings, and a rooftop green space. The house includes an attached carport, a spacious wooden deck, and a rectangular swimming pool in the backyard. Several outdoor seating areas and landscaped trees are present around the property, enhancing its contemporary urban appeal. The main entrance is accessible via a set of steps and is accentuated by a minimalist overhang. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, balconies, a rooftop garden, and a backyard pool. The exterior combines concrete, wood, and glass, with open decks and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large windows, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden deck, outdoor seating area, pool, and rooftop garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, extensive deck, and large glass windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, deck, and multiple balconies.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main door with steps, flat overhang, and no decorative columns
